body_txt: They live among us, but underneath those tufts is a facade — they're someone literally out of this world . Non-human, supernatural creatures are often coded with unusual hair colours to show their otherness, in contrast to "normal" characters who have red, blonde, brown, or black hair. While this trope often applies to purple hair, can also include green , pink , blue , white and many others. In some cases, characters have multicoloured hair or a Mark of the Supernatural . Expect other characters to comment on it, or for it to be mentioned as a Strong Family Resemblance to specific individuals. In some cases, characters may hide their hair or dye it to appear more conforming. In rare scenarios, the hair itself might be magical. If the setting is one where everyone, regardless of if they're human or not, has unnatural hair colours, see World of Technicolor Hair . Mystical White Hair is a Sub-Trope . This trope may or may not be related to Alien Princess , Amazing Technicolor Population , and Power Dyes Your Hair . Overlaps with Not Quite Human . Because the nature of this trope is that people aren't what they appear to be, beware of spoilers.
